statusText.markdownDescription: The (Jinja2) template of the status bar text which is inside the parentheses `(...)`. See https://jinja.palletsprojects.com/templates/

transform: walk(if type == "object" and has("summary") and (.summary | type == "string") then .summary |= gsub("\\$"; "\\$") else . end)
walk(if type == "object" and has("tags") and (.tags | type == "array") then .tags |= map(if type == "string" then gsub("\\$"; "\\$") else . end) else . end)
